highlights.description: Go SDK for building AI trading agents on Polymarket prediction markets
Multi-agent workflow system with portable specs deployable to Claude Code or Go servers

added.description: Polymarket API client for Gamma (markets) and CLOB (trading) APIs
`GetMarkets()` to fetch active prediction markets with filtering
`GetOrderBook()` to fetch order book data for tokens
Multi-agent-spec loader for YAML frontmatter markdown agents
Team and deployment JSON configuration parsers
Workflow executor with DAG-based topological sort
Three agent specs: market-analyst, superforecaster, trader
Deployment configs for Go server and Claude Code
`polymarket-agent` CLI with --demo flag for live market data

documentation.description: README with architecture diagram and quick start guide

tests.description: Integration tests for Polymarket API client
Unit tests for workflow topological sort and execution

dependencies.description: omnillm-core v0.15.0 for LLM provider abstraction
langchaingo v0.1.14 for chains and agents
